# opnsense_quagga_ospf_neighbor (Data Source)

Configure OSPF neighbors.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the resource.

### Read-Only

- `address` (String) The neighbor IP address.
- `description` (String) An optional description for this neighbor.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable this OSPF neighbor.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Poll interval in seconds.
- `priority` (Number) Neighbor priority.
